ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archaeological site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the archaeological site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "excavation_start_date" TEXT /* Date when excavation at the site began */,
  "excavation_end_date" TEXT /* Date when excavation at the site ended */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., settlement, burial ground) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the site */,
  "excavation_director" TEXT /* Name of the excavation director */,
  "excavation_team" TEXT /* List of team members involved in the excavation */,
  "site_status" TEXT /* Current status of the site (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the site's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chronologies" (
  "chronology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chronological entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the archaeological site */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the stratigraphic layer */,
  "thickness" INTEGER /* Thickness of the stratigraphic layer */,
  "age_limit_older" INTEGER /* Age limit for the older end of the layer */,
  "chronology_control_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chronological control point */,
  "layer_description" TEXT /* Description of the stratigraphic layer */,
  "material_found" TEXT /* Material found in the layer */,
  "artifact_count" INTEGER /* Number of artifacts found in the layer */,
  "age_limit_younger" INTEGER /* Age limit for the younger end of the layer */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the age estimates */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the chronological model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chronology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chronologies_chronology_control_id FOREIGN KEY ("chronology_control_id") REFERENCES chronology_controls ("chronology_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chronologies_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chronology_controls" (
  "chronology_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chronological control point */,
  "control_name" TEXT /* Name of the control point */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for dating (e.g., radiocarbon, dendrochronology) */,
  "calibration_curve" TEXT /* Calibration curve used for dating */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date obtained from the control point */,
  "control_description" TEXT /* Description of the control point */,
  "material_sampled" TEXT /* Material sampled for the control point */,
  "sample_id" TEXT /* ID of the sample used for the control point */,
  "laboratory" TEXT /* Laboratory where the sample was analyzed */,
  "laboratory_report_id" TEXT /* ID of the laboratory report */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the dating method */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the control point */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chronology_control_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "chronology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chronological data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_chronology_id FOREIGN KEY ("chronology_id") REFERENCES chronologies ("chronology_id")
)
